Nest trait data (subset)

Source: R/data.R
nesttrait_subset.Rd

A subset of ~920 bird species from the global nest trait database (v2), covering the same Corvoidea + allied families as avonet_subset. Contains nest site and structure information.

Usage

nesttrait_subset

Format

A data frame with columns:

Scientific_name

Scientific name (HBW/BirdLife v5 taxonomy)

Order

Order

Family

Family

Common_name

English common name

NestSite_ground

Ground nesting (0/1)

NestSite_tree

Tree nesting (0/1)

NestSite_nontree

Non-tree elevated nesting (0/1)

NestSite_cliff_bank

Cliff/bank nesting (0/1)

NestStr_scrape

Scrape nest (0/1)

NestStr_platform

Platform nest (0/1)

NestStr_cup

Cup nest (0/1)

NestStr_dome

Dome nest (0/1)

NestStr_primary_cavity

Primary cavity nester (0/1)

NestStr_second_cavity

Secondary cavity nester (0/1)

Source

Chia et al. (2023) A global database of bird nest traits. Scientific Data 10:444. doi:10.1038/s41597-023-02360-9

On this page

Developed by Shinichi Nakagawa, Santiago Ortega, Ayumi Mizuno, Eduardo S.A. Santos, Malgorzata Lagisz, Jimuel Jr Celeste, Sergio Poo Hernandez.
